message:
refactor(css): remove duplicate scrollbar-thin styles

Remove duplicated .scrollbar-thin CSS rules that were defined twice
in globals.css. The scrollbar styling for thin scrollbars was
accidentally duplicated, causing unnecessary CSS bloat:

- First occurrence around line 833 (removed)
- Second occurrence around line 1316 (removed)

The scrollbar utilities should use Tailwind's built-in scrollbar
plugin or be consolidated into a single definition if custom
styling is needed.

Also includes minor cleanup in cmaes-visualizations.tsx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
